productDisplayName: Estelle Women Gold Earring & Pendant Set
description: Style NoteShow off your season wardrobe with estelle's elegant earring and pendant sets. You can style them with ethnic garb or blend it in with sugary pastels for a refined finish. These come with a matching set of earrings (so that's one less thing to shop for!) This set is just right to add a feel-good factor to your day-to-night ensemble. Warranty: 1 yearProduct DetailsGold chain with a lobster clasp and adjustable linksAn oval pendant with white stone embellishmentsA pair of earrings in fish-shape with a fish hook closure and white stone embellishments.Material and care24 carat gold platedPewter base metalEarring posts made of hypo-allergic surgical steel to avoid skin allergiesHigh quality imported Crystals/CZsWipe with a clean cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength of earrings: 4 cmLength of chain: 40 cm
